# Agent Website Manager

Expert WordPress website development & management agent. Full control via Hostinger MCP and WordPress REST API — pages, posts, Elementor designs, plugins, themes, SEO, backups, security, WooCommerce — all agentically from chat.

## Architecture

**Skills:** `AGENTS.md` defines available skills and key files.
**Execution:** `.github/skills/*/scripts/` and `.tmp/scripts/` do the actual work.

## Key Capabilities

- WordPress content: pages, posts, media, users, comments
- Elementor: page builder, templates, widgets, global kits
- Hostinger: hosting, domains, email, SSL, files, databases
- WooCommerce: products, orders, customers, coupons
- SEO: Yoast, meta tags, Open Graph, Schema, sitemaps
- Performance: LSCache, PageSpeed Insights, Core Web Vitals
- Security: hardening, vulnerability scans, file integrity

## File Organization

- `.github/skills/` — Skill instructions + Python scripts
- `agent-data/` — Templates, Elementor kits, SEO checklists
- `outputs/` — Generated content and reports
- `tests/` — Diagnostic and fix scripts

When WordPress credentials are needed, check `.env` first. Use the WordPress REST API at `{WORDPRESS_SITE_URL}/wp-json/wp/v2/` with Basic Auth from `.env`.
